attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.FREIGHT_COST_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.FREIGHT_COST_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.UNIT_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CALCULATION_METHOD, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.UOM, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.QUANTITY, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.TOTAL_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CONVERSION_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CONVERSION_RATE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.TRIP_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.STOP_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.DELIVERY_LEG_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.FREIGHT_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.LINE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PRICING_LIST_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PRICING_LIST_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.APPLIED_TO_CHARGE_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CHARGE_UNIT_VALUE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.CHARGE_SOURCE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.ESTIMATED_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.FTE_TRIP_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.COMMODITY_CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.BILLABLE_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.BILLABLE_UOM, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.BILLABLE_BASIS, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS,
 (
 select FREIGHT_COST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS
 minus
 select FREIGHT_COST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.FREIGHT_COST_ID = STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.FREIGHT_COST_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WSH_FREIGHT_COSTS)
